phase_0_setup.description: Repo hygiene, structure, env, system spec, and progress tracking.

phase_1_core_features.description: Refactor indicator and price-structure logic into src/core/features.py with tests.

tasks.name: Implement core feature engine in src/core/features.py
Add unit tests for indicators and structure detection

phase_2_data_adapters.description: Implement Deriv and local CSV data adapters.

tasks.name: Add adapter tests (no real network calls)
Add .env.example and doc section for credentials

phase_3_backtest_engine.description: Implement backtest engine and metrics (single-symbol engine).

tasks.name: Define Signal types and strategy interface
Implement basic metrics (P&L, drawdown, win rate)

phase_e1_eda.description: Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA) for live Deriv data and visual validation.

phase_4_strategy_api.description: Define strategy interfaces and baseline deterministic strategy in src/core/signals.py.

phase_5_risk_engine.description: Implement risk sizing, drawdown rules, and corresponding tests.

phase_6_llm_integration.description: Integrate Langflow/LLM orchestration using JSON schemas without changing core logic.

tasks.name: Add LLM tools and agent harness

phase_1_research_harness.description: Timeframe windows, experiment registry, and deterministic notebook scaffolding.

notes: Initial structure and documentation skeleton created in Phase 0.
